description.content: ACS demographic, economic, social, and housing characteristics

Returns American Community Survey 1-Year Estimates for geographies with populations of 65,000 or more. Covers social, economic, demographic, and housing characteristics. Data available from 2005 to present.

query.description: (Required) Comma-separated list of variable names to retrieve (e.g., NAME,B01003_001E for name and total population). Maximum 50 variables per query.
Geographic level and FIPS code filter (e.g., state:01 for Alabama, county:*&in=state:06 for all CA counties)
Parent geography constraint for sub-state geographies (e.g., state:06 to restrict to California)
Census API key for higher usage limits (500+ requests/day)

response.name: 2D JSON array where the first row contains variable names and subsequent rows contain data values
Bad request — invalid parameters, missing required fields, or variable not found

description.content: Returns American Community Survey 5-Year Estimates for all geographies down to block group level. More reliable for small populations and small geographies. Data available from 2009 to present.

query.description: (Required) Comma-separated variable names (e.g., NAME,B01003_001E,B19013_001E for name, total population, and median household income)
Geographic level and FIPS code filter

response.name: 2D JSON array of ACS 5-Year data
Bad request — invalid parameters, missing required fields, or variable not found

description.content: Decennial Census population and housing counts
Returns Decennial Census redistricting data including population counts by race/ethnicity and housing unit counts. Data available for 2020 and 2010.

query.description: (Required) Variable names (e.g., P1_001N for total population)

response.name: 2D JSON array of decennial census data
Bad request — invalid parameters, missing required fields, or variable not found

description.content: Returns annual population estimates for states, counties, and metropolitan areas. Uses births, deaths, and migration to estimate population change between decennial censuses.

query.description: (Required) Variable names (e.g., NAME,POP,DATE_DESC for name, population, and date description)

response.name: 2D JSON array of population estimates
Bad request — invalid parameters, missing required fields, or variable not found

description.content: Returns annual statistics on the number of establishments, employment, first quarter payroll, and annual payroll for most U.S. industries at the national, state, county, and ZIP code level.

query.description: (Required) Variable names (e.g., NAME,NAICS2017,ESTAB,EMP,PAYANN for business name, NAICS code, establishments, employment, annual payroll)

response.name: 2D JSON array of business patterns data
Bad request — invalid parameters, missing required fields, or variable not found

description.content: Economic activity by industry and geography
Returns economic census data covering all major economic sectors every 5 years. Provides number of establishments, employment, payroll, and sales/receipts by industry (NAICS) and geography.

response.name: 2D JSON array of economic census data
Bad request — invalid parameters, missing required fields, or variable not found

description.content: Returns monthly and annual statistics on U.S. imports and exports by commodity, country, and port. Data available from 2010 to present.

query.description: (Required) Variable names (e.g., CTY_NAME,AIR_VAL_MO for country and airborne value)

response.name: 2D JSON array of international trade data
Bad request — invalid parameters, missing required fields, or variable not found

description.content: Returns demographic data for countries and areas with populations of 5,000 or more. Includes historical and projected data through 2100 with population by age and sex, births, deaths, migration, and more.

query.description: (Required) Variable names (e.g., NAME,POP for country name and population)

response.name: 2D JSON array of international demographic data
Bad request — invalid parameters, missing required fields, or variable not found

description.content: Converts a one-line address string to geographic coordinates and census geography identifiers (state, county, tract, block FIPS codes).

query.description: (Required) Full address as a single string (e.g., "4600 Silver Hill Rd, Washington DC 20233")
(Required) The geocoding benchmark to use (e.g., Public_AR_Current, Public_AR_Census2020)
Geographic vintage for returned geography identifiers (e.g., Current_Current, Census2020_Census2020)
Geographic layers to include in the response

response.name: Geocoding result with coordinates and census geography
Bad request — invalid parameters, missing required fields, or variable not found

description.content: Converts a structured address (street, city, state, ZIP) to geographic coordinates and census geography identifiers.

query.description: Two-character state abbreviation or FIPS code
Geographic vintage for returned geography identifiers

response.name: Geocoding result with coordinates and census geography
Bad request — invalid parameters, missing required fields, or variable not found

description.content:
The United States Census Bureau Data API provides programmatic access to statistical data from Census Bureau surveys and datasets. The API covers demographic, economic, housing, and social data through a query-based interface. Key datasets include the American Community Survey (ACS), Decennial Census, Population Estimates, County Business Patterns, and many more. Users can query data by geographic level (national, state, county, tract, block group) and filter by hundreds of statistical variables. An API key is optional (up to 500 requests/day without one) but required for higher usage.

Contact Support:
 Name: Census Developer Forum
 Email: cnmp.developers.list@census.gov
